DECLARATION OF NATHALIE HERNANDEZ OF ILYM GROUP, INC., IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR ORDER FINALLY APPROVING CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100080468) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERTRAM, MARISSA , AS AN INDIVIDUAL AND ON BEHALF OF OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 61973750) FILED BY DEFENDANT 7 HILLS RESTAURANT, LLC DBA "SPQR"
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUN-24-2019 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JUL-25-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MARISSA BERTRAM APPLICATION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT IS GRANTED ON THE CONDITIONS THAT 1) THE NOTICE BE AMENDED TO ALLOW ORAL OBJECTIONS AT THE FAIRNESS HEARING AND 2) THAT THE NOTICE BE AMENDED TO DISCLOSE EITHER THE REASONABLY ANTICIPATED FEE TO BE CHARGED BY THE SETTLEMENT ADMINISTRATOR OR THE MAXIMUM FEE TO BE DISCLOSED BY THE SETTLEMENT ADMINISTRATOR. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS TO PERPARE FORM OF ORDER THAT IS APPROVED AS TO FORM AND COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. THE ORDER SHALL INCLUDE A DATE THAT IS AGREED TO BY ALL PARTIES FOR A FAIRNESS HEARING WHICH IS TO BE SET IS TO BE SET FOR ANY DAY MONDAY THROUGH THURSDAY, 9:30 A.M. IN DEPARTMENT 302. (AS FULLY REPORTED IN THE REPORTER'S TRANSCRIPTS) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: W. TRUPEK, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED.=(302/EPS)

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT NAMED PLAINTIFF MARISSA BERTRAM'S MOTION FOR FINAL APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT AND PAGA SETTLEMENT, AND APPLICATION FOR AWARD OF ATTORNEY'S FEES AND EXPENSES, CLASS REPRESENTATIVE ENHANCEMENT, AND SETTLEMENT ADMINISTRATION COSTS. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED; NO CLASS MEMBER OBJECTED TO THE SETTLEMENT. THE COURT INDICATES IT WILL HAVE THE CLERK CONTACT COUNSEL FOR THE MOVING PARTY TO REQUEST THAT THE MOVING PARTY MODIFY THE PROPOSED ORDER THAT WAS SUBMITTED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS TO ADD MISSING NUMERICAL AMOUNTS AND TO E-MAIL THAT REVISED PROPOSED ORDER TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG. calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-24-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement And Paga Settlement, And Application For Award Of Attorneys Fees And Expenses, Class Representative Enhancement, And Settlement Administration Costs
Off Calendar Aug-30-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF MARISSA BERTRAM'S Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement And PAGA Settlement, And Application For Award Of Attorneys Fees And Expenses, Class Representative Enhancement, And Settlement Administration Costs.

No appearances made in this matter.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling to grant named plaintiff Marissa Bertram's motion for final approval of class action settlement and PAGA settlement, and application for award of attorney's fees and expenses, class representative enhancement, and settlement administration costs. No opposition was filed; no class member objected to the settlement.

The Court indicates it will have the clerk contact counsel for the moving party to request that the moving party modify the proposed order that was submitted with the moving papers to add missing numerical amounts and to e-mail that revised proposed order to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano, CSR#8600, e-mail: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

Final Fairness And Approval Hearing For Class Action Settlement (Per Order Filed 2/27/19)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-05-2019 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-01-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Application For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Feb-04-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jennifer Kramer, Esq., Telephone 213-226-4358 for Plaintiff;
Matt Wayne, Esq., Armstrong Law Firm, Telephone 415-231-4400 for Plaintiff;
Michelle Freeman, Esq. and Marie Trimble Holvick, Esq., Gordon & Rees, Telephone 415-875-3765, for Defendnat 7 Hills Restaurant;

Court address with counsel some concerns before granting preliminary approval of class action settlement (as fully reported in the reporter's notes)

Ruling - A R G U E D: The Court makes the following ruling:

PLAINTIFF MARISSA BERTRAM Application For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement is granted on the conditions That 1) The notice be amended to allow oral objections at the fairness hearing and 2) That the notice be amended to disclose either the reasonably anticipated fee to be charged by the settlement administrator or the maximum fee to be disclosed by the settlement administrator. Plaintiff's counsel is to perpare form of order that is approved as to form and complies with CRC 3.1312. The order shall include a date that is agreed to by all parties for a Fairness Hearing which is to be set is to be set for any day Monday through Thursday, 9:30 a.m. in department 302. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcripts)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
